landing.headline: Reply to clients in 5 seconds. Not 5 minutes.
landing.subheadline: ReplyPro writes perfect replies for you. You just click 'Send'.
landing.no_card: 10 free generations. No credit card required.
landing.pain_1: Client messages at 10 PM. You reply at 10 AM. They're already with your competitor.
landing.pain_2: You're writing the same reply for the 15th time this week. Copy-paste from old messages.
landing.pain_3: You need to sound professional, but don't have time to craft the perfect response.
landing.step1_desc: Copy a client message from WhatsApp, Viber, or email
landing.step3_desc: Pick a tone, copy, send to your client
landing.example_message: Hi, I'm looking for a 3-bedroom apartment in downtown Zagreb, up to €200,000. Do you have anything?
landing.example_pro: Dear Sir/Madam, thank you for your inquiry. We have several excellent options in central Zagreb that match your criteria. I suggest we meet so I can personally present the properties. Best regards, Agent
landing.example_friendly: Hey! Great to hear from you. I have a few apartments right in the center that could work — 3 bedrooms, great locations. When would be good for you to take a look? Let me know!
landing.example_direct: I have 3 apartments in central Zagreb within your budget. I can send details or arrange a viewing. Let me know.
landing.feat_tones_desc: Professional, friendly, or direct — for every situation
landing.feat_templates_desc: 15+ ready templates for first contact, follow-up, pricing and more
landing.feat_clients_desc: Track clients, their interests, and negotiation status
landing.feat_properties_desc: Add properties and AI automatically includes them in replies
landing.feat_history_desc: All generated replies in one place, always accessible
landing.roi_title: How much time do you waste on messages?
landing.roi_subtitle: Calculate how much ReplyPro saves you monthly
landing.faq_1_a: Yes, it automatically detects Croatian and English and generates replies in the same language.
landing.faq_2_q: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
landing.faq_2_a: No. You get 10 free generations without any payment information.
landing.faq_3_a: Yes, every reply is editable before copying. You can also save favorites.
landing.faq_4_q: Is it secure? Who sees my messages?
landing.faq_4_a: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. Nobody except you has access to your messages.
landing.final_cta_title: Your competitor is already replying faster.
landing.final_cta_desc: Start now. 10 free generations, no card required.
